html:
Exclusive to:

“Oh, Charlie. What are you gettin' me into now?”

–Winona

The Fragile Rose can be obtained by Winona with the Shadow Seeker II skill. The player needs to equip Rose-Colored Glasses and closely examine a Flower or Rose. After examining, the Flower will turn into a Rose and the player can click it again to pick up the Fragile Rose. The player can also examine it again to dismiss it, but the Flower will remain as Rose.

When Winona dies with a Fragile Rose in her inventory, she will immediately respawn with all the items near a Night Light, without max health penalty. If there are no Night Lights in the world, the player will respawn at the Florid Postern instead. A Rose will appear at the place where the player died. The message will say that Winona is resurrected by Charlie.

Once resurrected, the player will have the same Hunger and Sanity as they have before death, but have only 50 Health like other methods of resurrection.

If Fragile Rose is dropped on the ground, it will instantly disappear. It cannot be moved to a Backpack or any other storage container.

Tips

  • It is advisable not to carry the Fragile Rose in the leftmost inventory slot. Mobs such as frogs can cause the item in that slot to drop to the ground, which instantly deletes the Fragile Rose.
  • The player can have more than one Fragile Rose. Only one Rose will be used for each resurrection.
  • If Winona dies near a flower, the newly planted Rose will pop the flower off and drops a petal on the ground.
  • Roses have a low chance to appear when planting a butterfly, but Winona can use this skill to turn a Flower bed into a Rose garden.

Gallery

  • Winona dying with a Fragile Rose.
  • Winona respawn by Fragile Rose.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Winona có thể lấy được Fragile Rose bằng kỹ năng Shadow Seeker II. Người chơi cần trang bị Kính màu hoa hồng và kiểm tra chặt chẽ một bông hoa hoặc hoa hồng. Sau khi kiểm tra, Bông hoa sẽ biến thành Hoa hồng và người chơi có thể nhấp lại vào đó để nhặt Hoa hồng mong manh. Người chơi cũng có thể kiểm tra lại để loại bỏ nó, nhưng Bông hoa sẽ vẫn là Hoa hồng.

{{Quote|Oh, Charlie. What are you gettin' me into now?|Winona}}
The '''Fragile Rose''' can be obtained by [[Winona]] with the [[Shadow Seeker II]] skill. The player needs to equip [[Rose-Colored Glasses]] and closely examine a [[Flowers|Flower]] or [[Rose]]. After examining, the Flower will turn into a Rose and the player can click it again to pick up the Fragile Rose. The player can also examine it again to dismiss it, but the Flower will remain as Rose.

When Winona dies with a Fragile Rose in her inventory, she will immediately respawn with all the items near a [[Night Light]], without max health penalty. If there are no Night Lights in the world, the player will respawn at the [[Florid Postern]] instead. A Rose will appear at the place where the player died. The message will say that Winona is resurrected by Charlie.

Once resurrected, the player will have the same [[Hunger]] and [[Sanity]] as they have before death, but have only 50 [[Health]] like other methods of resurrection.

If Fragile Rose is dropped on the ground, it will instantly disappear. It cannot be moved to a [[Backpack/DST|Backpack]] or any other [[Storage Solutions Filter|storage container]].

== {{Pic32|prototype}} Tips ==
* It is advisable not to carry the Fragile Rose in the leftmost inventory slot. Mobs such as frogs can cause the item in that slot to drop to the ground, which instantly deletes the Fragile Rose.
* The player can have more than one Fragile Rose. Only one Rose will be used for each resurrection.
* If Winona dies near a flower, the newly planted Rose will pop the flower off and drops a petal on the ground.
* Roses have a low chance to appear when planting a butterfly, but Winona can use this skill to turn a Flower bed into a Rose garden.
